chips.text: sick note/ care form issued as per clinician

history_draft.text: Parent/guardian reports vomiting and/or diarrhea for [duration]. Vomiting frequency: [vomiting_frequency]. Diarrhea frequency: [diarrhea_frequency]. Oral intake/hydration: [oral_intake_hydration]. Urine output: [urine_output]. Fever: [fever_context]. Blood/mucus: [blood_mucus_context]. Parent concern: [parent_guardian_concern]. [Relevant negatives reviewed].

clinical_blockers: The source does not cover every cause of pediatric vomiting or diarrhea.
Treatment and feeding choices, fixed follow-up intervals, and school documentation remain unsupported by this mapping.
The workflow is broader than DHA telehealth setting.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
